title: wemmbu mod
description: this mod is a mod that add a music disc that play a music that used in wemmbu untable vedios usualy and to get it in survival you got to kill wemmbu in the mushroom island and if you kill him and get the disc you get a cool advancement and you can craft
body:
# what this mod add's:

the music disc is a music used in wemmbu's unstable universe video usualy

and also adds a sword named THE FLAME like wemmbu's rivil flamefrags (the crafting recipe in the gallery)



## and to get the music disc there is two ways:

with op :

```
/give <your name> wemmbu_music_disc:wemmbu
```
in survival mod :


you should go to a mushroom island and you'll find wemmbu there and kill him and you'll get the music disc and an advancement

### why should you download this mod:

if you love wemmbu's content you'll like this mod
